mapper.sql: pett.title_id as pet_id, pett.employee_id, pett.title_level, pett.title_name, pett.evaluation_time, pett.new_title_flag, pett.instructions_flag, pett.check_flag, pett.attribute1, pett.attribute2, pett.attribute3, pett.enabled_flag, pett.id, pett.update_time, pett.create_by, pett.create_time, pett.update_by

${tAlias}.title_id as ${tAlias}_pet_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.title_level as ${tAlias}_title_level, ${tAlias}.title_name as ${tAlias}_title_name, ${tAlias}.evaluation_time as ${tAlias}_evaluation_time, ${tAlias}.new_title_flag as ${tAlias}_new_title_flag, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_title_temp (employee_id, title_id, title_level, title_name, evaluation_time, new_title_flag, instructions_flag, check_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_time, create_by, create_time, update_by) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeTitle.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{titleLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{newTitleFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_title_temp set title_id = #{employeeTitle.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title_level = #{titleLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title_name = #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluation_time = #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, new_title_flag = #{newTitleFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
